allow: Bash(node -e "const XLSX = require\('xlsx'\); const wb = XLSX.readFile\('Documentacion/SUITORG01-2026.xlsx'\); console.log\('Pestañas:', wb.SheetNames.join\('\\n'\)\); wb.SheetNames.forEach\(s => { const sheet = wb.Sheets[s]; const data = XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json\(sheet, {header:1}\); console.log\('\\n=== ' + s + ' \(' + data.length + ' filas\) ==='\); if\(data.length>0\) console.log\('Headers:', data[0]\); }\);")
